summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Starlink Multi-Account Management App. Backend APIs are fully functional with 100% test success rate. Frontend has core functionality working but some UI component issues identified.

ui_bugs.issue: React runtime error: 'A <Select.Item /> must have a value prop that is not an empty string'
Device name input field not accessible - timeout on selector
User gets redirected to login page after some operations, indicating session persistence issues

passed_tests: Dashboard displays stats (total accounts, online/offline, tickets, devices)
All backend API endpoints (21/21 tests passed)
CRUD operations for accounts, billing, tickets, extenders
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix Select component value prop issues in shadcn/ui components. Investigate device management modal accessibility. Review session management for better persistence.

success_percentage.frontend: 85% (most core functionality working, some UI component issues)
